Cortaderia Selloana Pampas Grass White

Cortaderia selloana
Potted plant
Nursery pot size Ø 9cm
1 perennial plant
Height Delivery inc pot 20-30 cm
Cutflowers
€4.75
Stock 100+
SKU
A02954
+
Add to Wish List Add to Compare
  • Fast delivery 3-5 working days

    We do our very best to deliver your order within 1 week. Your order will be packaged in such a way that a longer delivery time does not harm the plants. If something is damaged, please contact us after receipt. Your order is 100% guaranteed!

  • Track & trace

    We will send you tracking information as soon as your package leaves our depot. We also deliver on Saturdays. You can trace your package thru the DPD website.

  • Grow & Money back guarantee ⓘ

    We provide 2 months grow guarantee. Refund if plant fails to grow.
    See our guarantee policy for details. 



  • Shipping cost from €8,95 per order

    You pay a fixed price of from €8,95 per order for Ireland destinations regardless of the size of your order.
    Orders are delivered by DPD courier service.
    Delivery time is approx 3-5 business days. You can track your parcel and a signature is required by the recepient.

  • Secure payment options

    Our payment options

    You can safely pay thru our webshop. All our payments are executed by Multisafepay and Paypal within a secure environment. We accept all major creditcards and paypal.

A great ornamental eye catcher for the border or as a freestanding plant in your garden. This striking specimen is a fast evergreen grass that blooms

Grow Guarantee

Buy without worries, you have a two-month growth guarantee on all plants!

Skip to the end of the images gallery
Ø 9cm
Skip to the beginning of the images gallery
Description
A great ornamental eye catcher for the border or as a freestanding plant in your garden! This striking specimen is a fast evergreen grass that blooms with large soft white plumes during late summer lasting well into autumn. They are suitable for large gardens. It’s impressive size can reach a height over 2 Mt. Not deliverable in: France,Portugal,Spain

Details
Details
Botanical nameCortaderia selloana
CategoryGrasses
Subcategorycortaderia
Delivered asPotPlant
aa_height20-30cm
FlowersYes
Flower periodAutumn-Winter
FragranrNo
CutflowersYes
Flower colourWhite
FruitsNo
EdibleNo
LocationSunny
HardyNo
GroundcoveringNo
NaturalizingNo
Plant spacing60cm
Preferred SoilAny soil
Full grown height150cm - 200cm
Mature width125cm - 150cm
PoisonousNo
SizeØ 9cm
Care - Usage

How to take care of Cortaderia Selloana Pampas Grass White

Plant Cortaderia Pampasgras Wit in well-drained soil in a sunny to partially shady position. Wrap Cortaderia Pampasgras Wit in winter with some straw to prevent frost damage. Cortaderia Pampasgras Wit works best as a solitary growing plant or against a backround of dark evergreen foliage. In autumn cut away the flowering stems and in early spring cut away the dead foliage and Cortaderia Pampasgras Wit will quickly re -grow and bloom during autumn.

Martina O. from Cork
16-07-2023
Plants were in excellent condition when they arrived. From ordering to delivery was excellent. Looking forward to watching the vines grow and hopefully we will enjoy the grapes in the near future.
Excellent
Wayne B. from Waterford
17-07-2023
Plant arrived on time and in tip top condition, will not hesitate to order again.
Excellent
Ciara O. from Leixlip
15-07-2023
Excellent range of plants. Good delivery service. Details of plants and how to care for them always included.
Excellent
